_meta.principle: Notable DHH cyphers · multi-artist tracks that became defining ensemble pieces.

cyphers.title: Northeast Cypher 2020
cyphers.blurb: The cypher that finally put NE rap on the national radar. Khasi Bloodz, Sikdar, Kabir, Freakyy and others on one track. 659K streams on Spotify and counting.

cyphers.title: Gully Gang Cyphers
cyphers.blurb: Multi-track series of Gully Gang ensemble cyphers. Divine, MC Altaf, D'Evil, Shah Rule, Aavrutti all trading bars. The clearest snapshot of the Mumbai sound circa post-Gully Boy.

cyphers.title: Bantai Records Cyphers
cyphers.blurb: Emiway's annual cypher series. Emiway, Shez, Young Galib trading verses. Designed as the calling card for the independent path.

cyphers.title: Mass Appeal India Cyphers
cyphers.blurb: The label-curated annual showcases. Multi-artist tracks featuring rotating roster + invited heads. Built to position the label as the home of Indian hip-hop journalism plus music.
